key_insights.insight: Empowerment comes from taking control of one's health through actions like fasting, leading to increased confidence and autonomy.
key_insights.quote: It has really bolstered my confidence and I can now do hard things.

key_insights.insight: Many modern diseases stem from our bodies not aligning with our evolutionary biology and the thrifty gene we inherited from hunter-gatherer ancestors.
key_insights.quote: The ones that are not accessing that are actually killing themselves because they're not in alignment with their own biology.

key_insights.insight: The food industry often prioritizes profit over health, leading to the use of chemicals and obesogens that can reprogram stem cells into fat cells.
key_insights.quote: It's because what we are eating is reprogramming our cells to make fat cells.

key_insights.insight: Time-restricted eating is more about nutrient deficiency and glucose drop to trigger healing mechanisms than simply calorie restriction.
key_insights.quote: You're creating an internal mechanism with time restriction that is going to stimulate a healing process, and it's nutrient deficiency along with glucose drop. It doesn't have to do with calories.

key_insights.insight: For women, it's critical to cycle fasting according to their menstrual cycle to honor hormonal rhythms.
key_insights.quote: So we say don't fast the week before your period because you need glucose to be higher and you don't want cortisol to be high.

key_insights.insight: Gut microbes play a vital role in controlling blood sugar levels and influencing food cravings, and can be positively impacted by apple cider vinegar.
key_insights.quote: Apple cider vinegar is incredibly nurturing to the gut microbes. And your gut microbes actually control your blood sugar levels.

key_insights.insight: Longer fasts (around 72 hours) can reboot the immune system and promote systemic stem cell production, aiding in repair throughout the body.
key_insights.quote: For systemic stem cells, three days, 72 hours. And those systemic stem cells can do what for me? They can go anywhere in your body and repair anything.

key_insights.insight: High hemoglobin A1c levels indicate glycation, where excess glucose gums up red blood cells, hindering their ability to deliver oxygen to tissues.
key_insights.quote: The higher that number is, there's a process called glycation going on in the body where the red blood cells that deliver oxygen to tissue are gummed up with the extra glucose the body doesn't know how to get into the cells

key_insights.insight: The liver is essential for breaking down hormones, such as estrogen and thyroid hormone, and its health is crucial for hormonal balance and metabolic function.
key_insights.quote: So liver breaks down hormones. So you need it to break down hormones, like thyroid hormone.

actionable_advice.advice: Read ingredient labels and avoid products with unrecognizable chemicals.
actionable_advice.how_to: Examine the ingredient list of packaged foods and research any unfamiliar ingredients to understand their potential health effects.

actionable_advice.advice: Incorporate pulsing in ketones through intermittent fasting, with a minimum of 12 hours fasting to trigger metabolic switch.
actionable_advice.how_to: Start with a 12-hour overnight fast and gradually increase the fasting window to find what works for you.

actionable_advice.advice: Women should adjust their fasting schedules around their menstrual cycle, avoiding fasting the week before their period.
actionable_advice.how_to: Track your menstrual cycle and adjust your fasting periods accordingly, prioritizing glucose intake the week before your period.

actionable_advice.advice: Monitor your liver health by regularly checking the corner of your eyes, the bottom of your feet and the white coat on your tongue.
actionable_advice.how_to: Each morning, look at your tongue for a white coat. Regularly look at the corner of your eyes for a yellow tinge. Check the bottom of your feet for dry cracks.

actionable_advice.advice: Check your hemoglobin A1c value to see your metabolic efficiency and level of insulin sensitivity.
actionable_advice.how_to: Visit your doctor and request a hemoglobin A1c test.

memorable_stories: The story of the woman going through menopause who regained confidence through fasting and said she could now "do hard things".
The story of the woman's Achilles tendon injury that healed after a five-day water fast.
Dr. Mindy's anecdote about her nephew discovering a cancer-causing chemical in frozen waffles.
contrarian_claims: The claim that a glass of wine can sometimes be beneficial for connection by lowering cortisol and raising oxytocin (when used responsibly)
The statement that all foods are safe is a lie.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Fasting Expert: "The Truth About Ozempic", These 3 Foods Are Leading To Cancer! Our Supermarket Food Isn't Safe! - Dr Mindy Pelz
